title: End Campfire
description: A Simple Mod That Adds Campfires That Freeze you
body:
# End Campfire

## Description
The End Campfire mod adds a special campfire, a mod commission from al1en.

## Features

- **Freezing Effect**: When enabled through game rules, entities that come into contact with the End Campfire experience slowed movement and freezing effects, contrasting with the burning effect of regular campfires.
  
- **Cooking Functionality**: Like vanilla campfires, this block allows you to cook food items by placing them directly on the campfire.

- **Customizable Behavior**: The mod includes a custom game rule (`/gamerule shouldEndCampfireFreeze`) that lets server administrators toggle the special collision behavior of the End Campfire.

## Game Integration

- The End Campfire can be found in the "Functional Blocks" creative tab
- Fully compatible with vanilla campfire cooking recipes
- Provides light level equivalent to vanilla campfires (level 15 when lit)

Whether you're looking to add atmospheric lighting to your End builds or create functional cooking stations with a unique twist, the End Campfire offers an interesting alternative to vanilla campfires with its distinctive End-themed visuals and optional freezing mechanics.
